answers.label: answer-1
answers.evidence: Ordered eight-field record; workflow planning stays separate from Codex-native runtime; shape-derived T1, fail-closed qualification, real-handle gate, join and endpoint verification all pass without dynamic facts.

answers.label: answer-2
answers.evidence: Fair-prompt baseline reconstructs the chain but asserts exact provider flags, Codex seven-day quota and session-id extraction without live evidence, and opens two references.
